basics.description:
**Azure Amortized Cost Management** — Enterprise-grade budget management and amortized cost alerting for Azure at scale.

This platform bridges Azure's actual-cost-only budget limitation with amortized cost tracking for Reserved Instances and Savings Plans.

[Learn more](https://github.com/gitpavleenbali/azure-amortized-cost-management)

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region where all resources will be deployed.

basics.name: environment
basics.label: Environment
basics.toolTip: Short environment name used in resource naming. Common values: dev, staging, prod, uat, sandbox, shared. Lowercase letters and numbers only (2-10 chars).
basics.placeholder: e.g. dev, staging, prod, uat, sandbox

constraints.validationMessage: Environment must be 2-10 lowercase characters (letters and numbers, must start with a letter). Examples: dev, staging, prod, uat, sandbox.

basics.name: finopsEmail
basics.label: FinOps Team Email
basics.toolTip: Email address for budget alerts and compliance notifications.

constraints.validationMessage: Please enter a valid email address.

options.text: Configure subscription-level and resource group default budgets. All amounts are in your subscription's billing currency.

elements.name: subscriptionBudgetAmount
elements.label: Monthly Subscription Budget
elements.toolTip: Monthly budget amount for the entire subscription. Alerts fire at 50%, 75%, 90%, 100%, and 110%.

elements.name: defaultBudgetAmount
elements.label: Default Resource Group Budget
elements.toolTip: Default budget amount automatically assigned to new resource groups by the auto-budget Logic App.

options.text: Enable or disable platform capabilities. Start with defaults for a quick setup, or customize for your governance needs.

elements.name: enableAutoBudget
elements.label: Auto-Budget on new Resource Groups — Automatically assign a default budget when new resource groups are created via Event Grid.

elements.name: enableSelfServiceChange
elements.label: Self-Service Budget Changes — Enable an HTTP endpoint for teams to request budget increases with guardrails (floor/cap limits).

elements.name: enablePolicy
elements.label: Budget Audit Policy — Deploy an Azure Policy that flags resource groups without a budget (AuditIfNotExists).

elements.name: enableAmortizedPipeline
elements.label: Amortized Cost Pipeline — Deploy the Function App for daily amortized cost evaluation (requires post-deploy setup of cost export).

elements.name: enableRbacAssignment
elements.label: RBAC Role Assignments — Automatically assign required roles to Logic App managed identities (requires User Access Administrator).

options.text: Optional integration settings. These can be configured after deployment.

elements.name: resourceGroupName
elements.label: Resource Group Name
elements.toolTip: Leave blank to use the default naming convention: rg-finops-governance-{environment}

constraints.validationMessage: Resource group name must be 1-90 characters (alphanumeric, periods, underscores, hyphens, parentheses).

elements.name: teamsWebhookUri
elements.label: Teams Webhook URL
elements.toolTip: Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL for budget alert notifications. Leave blank to use email-only alerts.

elements.name: functionAppKey
elements.toolTip: Function App host key for Cosmos sync. Set this after deploying the Function App code.
